translations.en: Captain John
translations.zh: 約翰船長

translations.en: a long-haired gentleman with a scholarly demeanor.
translations.zh: 一位長髮、氣質儒雅的紳士。

translations.en: "Ah, my good friend! Thou hast returned!"
translations.zh: 「啊，我的好友！你回來了！」

translations.en: "Praise the virtues! Humans have arrived here at last!"
translations.zh: 「諸德保佑！人類終於來到這裡了！」

translations.en: "But what's this? Not just any humans--the Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「但這是——不是普通的人類——是聖者！」

translations.en: "'Tis most fortuitous that thou hast returned, noble $P."
translations.zh: 「汝的歸來實乃天賜良機，高貴之$P。」

translations.en: "Many @cataclysms have occurred since thou last visited Britannia!"
translations.zh: 「自汝上次造訪不列顛尼亞以來，已發生了諸多@cataclysms災變！」

translations.en: "Why, I'm Captain John, $G!"
translations.zh: 「哎，我是約翰船長，$G！」

translations.en: "For several years I have been here in the catacombs, @studying the @gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「數年來我一直身在這地下墓穴，@studying研究@gargoyles魔像。」

translations.en: "Yes, I have learned much about them!"
translations.zh: 「是的，我對他們了解甚多！」

translations.en: "They are not evil, as most humans believe!"
translations.zh: 「他們並非邪惡，儘管大多數人類如此認為！」

translations.en: "I have spent much time talking to them, and I have found them to be almost human."
translations.zh: 「我花了大量時間與他們交談，發現他們幾乎與人類無異。」

translations.en: "I have learned about their @society, their @beliefs and their @language."
translations.zh: 「我學習了他們的@society社會、@beliefs信仰與@language語言。」

translations.en: "The gargoyle world, once as large as Britannia itself, is slowly being destroyed!"
translations.zh: 「魔像的世界，曾與不列顛尼亞本身一樣遼闊，如今正緩緩崩毀！」

translations.en: "The forces thou set in motion have caused great sections of their land to fall off into the void!"
translations.zh: 「汝所啟動的力量，致使他們大片土地墜入虛空！」

translations.en: "Only a single gargoyle @city remains."
translations.zh: 「魔像僅剩一座@city城市尚存。」

translations.en: "The gargoyle City of Investigation, their place of learning and government, is all that is left."
translations.zh: 「魔像的探索之城——他們的學術與政治中心——是僅存之地。」

translations.en: "Thou must do something to save the gargoyle race!"
translations.zh: 「汝必須採取行動，拯救魔像族群！」

translations.en: "I know not what, however."
translations.zh: 「但我不知道該如何行動。」

translations.en: "Thou must @talk to the @gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「汝必須與@gargoyles魔像@talk交談。」

translations.en: "There are two kinds of gargoyles, winged and wingless ones."
translations.zh: 「魔像有兩種：有翼者與無翼者。」

translations.en: "At first it seemed as if the wingless ones were slaves."
translations.zh: 「起初我以為無翼者是奴隸。」

translations.en: "But now I know that the wingless ones are beloved and valued family members."
translations.zh: 「但如今我知道，無翼者是備受珍視、深受愛護的家族成員。」

translations.en: "They must be told what to do, because they are not truly intelligent."
translations.zh: 「他們需要被告知該做什麼，因為他們並非真正有智識。」

translations.en: "The @gargoyles live honorably, by their own set of @beliefs."
translations.zh: 「@gargoyles魔像按照自己一套@beliefs信仰，光榮地生活。」

translations.en: "The gargoyles' beliefs are much like our own."
translations.zh: 「魔像的信仰與我們的信仰頗為相似。」

translations.en: "Where we have the three principles of Truth, Love and Courage,
translations.zh: 「我們有真實、愛與勇氣三大原則，

translations.en: they have the principles of Control, Passion and Diligence."
translations.zh: 他們則有克制、熱情與勤勉三大原則。」

translations.en: "Directly, these lead to the virtues of Direction, Feeling, and Persistence."
translations.zh: 「直接衍生，即為方向、感知與堅毅三德。」

translations.en: "Combined, they lead to Balance, Achievement and Precision."
translations.zh: 「交互結合，則衍生出平衡、成就與精準。」

translations.en: "Taken all together, they point to Order."
translations.zh: 「總括而言，皆指向秩序。」

translations.en: "And the sum of all the principles is Singularity."
translations.zh: 「而所有原則之總和，即為一體性。」

translations.en: "Gargoyle society stresses unity and singularity in all things."
translations.zh: 「魔像社會強調萬事萬物的一體性與合一。」

translations.en: "They have to; their world has always been harsh, even before the @cataclysms."
translations.zh: 「他們不得不如此；他們的世界一向嚴酷，即便在@cataclysms災變之前亦然。」

translations.en: "With the help of a gargoyle child, @Beh @Lem, I have learned how to speak their language."
translations.zh: 「在一位魔像孩童@Beh @Lem貝蘭的幫助下，我學會了如何說他們的語言。」

translations.en: "Wouldst thou like to learn?"
translations.zh: 「汝可願意學習？」

translations.en: "He and I meet every day at noon, where Hythloth emerges in the gargoyle lands."
translations.zh: 「他與我每天正午在伊斯洛斯通往魔像之地的出口處相會。」

translations.en: "Go and speak with him, learn about the gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「去找他談，了解魔像。」

translations.en: "You must save them!"
translations.zh: 「你必須拯救他們！」

translations.en: "No, I cannot. I must stay here and continue my writing."
translations.zh: 「不，我無法同行。我必須留在此地繼續撰述。」

translations.en: "But @Beh @Lem may join thee."
translations.zh: 「但@Beh @Lem貝蘭或許可以加入汝。」

translations.en: "With his help, thou canst travel the gargoyle lands and learn how to save them."
translations.zh: 「藉助他的幫助，汝可遊歷魔像之地，學習如何拯救他們。」

translations.en: "Farewell again, noble Avatar."
translations.zh: 「再會了，高貴的聖者。」

translations.en: "As the gargoyles say, 'May thy persistence and precision lead to success.'"
translations.zh: 「如魔像所說：『願恆毅與精準引領汝走向成功。』」
translations.note: 魔像告別祝詞，與 169_Valkadesh 相同

translations.en: "Upon you rests the future of an entire race."
translations.zh: 「整個族群的未來，繫於汝一身。」

translations.en: "Wait!"
translations.zh: 「且慢！」

translations.en: "Thou must meet Beh Lem and travel with him among the gargoyle people."
translations.zh: 「汝必須與貝蘭相會，隨他在魔像族群中穿行。」

translations.en: "That is the only way you can save them, and save them you must!"
translations.zh: 「那是唯一能拯救他們的方法，而你非救不可！」

translations.en: "And without @Beh @Lem with you, the gargoyles will attack!"
translations.zh: 「若沒有@Beh @Lem貝蘭同行，魔像便會攻擊！」

translations.en: "Oh, the things I could say of that!"
translations.zh: 「哦，我有多少話可以說！」

translations.en: "But we have not the time."
translations.zh: 「但我們沒有時間。」

translations.en: "When both worlds have been saved, then we can discuss such matters."
translations.zh: 「等兩個世界都得救之後，我們再來討論這些。」

translations.en: "I had a silver tablet that contained much of what I had learned."
translations.zh: 「我有一塊銀板，記載了我所學到的大量知識。」

translations.en: "I gave it to some gypsies to take to Mariah, at the Lycaeum."
translations.zh: 「我將它交給幾個吉普賽人，請他們送去學苑的瑪麗雅那裡。」

translations.en: "Did it arrive safely?"
translations.zh: 「那塊板子平安送到了嗎？」

translations.en: "Good! I am glad to know that the gypsies kept their word."
translations.zh: 「太好了！得知吉普賽人信守承諾，我大感寬慰。」

translations.en: "That tablet must have amazed Mariah!"
translations.zh: 「那塊板子一定讓瑪麗雅大吃一驚！」

translations.en: "No?! But I paid money, good money, for them to carry it to her!"
translations.zh: 「沒有？！但我付了錢，真正的好錢，請他們帶去啊！」

translations.en: "No matter. Now that thou art here, all is well."
translations.zh: 「沒關係。如今汝在此，一切安好。」

translations.en: "You can study the @gargoyles yourself, and carry the knowledge back to the surface!"
translations.zh: 「汝可親自研究@gargoyles魔像，將所得知識帶回地面！」

translations.en: "Here." He hands you a scroll.
translations.zh: 「拿著。」他遞給你一卷卷軸。

translations.en: "Use this scroll; it contains a basic vocabulary of the Gargoyle language."
translations.zh: 「使用這卷卷軸；它包含魔像語言的基礎詞彙。」

translations.en: "But you must!"
translations.zh: 「但你必須！」

translations.en: "Thou hast no chance of saving the gargoyles if thou knowest not their @language!"
translations.zh: 「若汝不懂他們的@language語言，便毫無拯救魔像的機會！」

translator_notes: 約翰船長是本作最重要的橋梁NPC，在地下墓穴多年研究魔像。魔像三原則對應人類三原則：Control/Passion/Diligence → Direction/Feeling/Persistence → Balance/Achievement/Precision → Order → Singularity，一律採用固定譯名（克制/熱情/勤勉 → 方向/感知/堅毅 → 平衡/成就/精準 → 秩序 → 一體性）。魔像告別祝詞「願恆毅與精準引領汝走向成功」與 169_Valkadesh 保持一致。銀板→吉普賽人→瑪麗雅的線索與學苑相關主線呼應。
